name: Fulton Loan Office, INC.
description_short: Atlanta-based pawn shop since 1924 offering collateral loans and sales of gold, jewelry, watches, and other valuables with quick cash transactions.
description_long:
Fulton Loan Office, Inc. is an established pawn shop in Atlanta with over 100 years of operating history, having been in business since 1924. The company positions itself as a solution provider for individuals with immediate financial needs, using personal valuables as collateral for loans or as items for direct purchase. They operate both as a lender and a retailer of pre-owned merchandise.

The company offers collateral-based loans on a wide range of items including precious metals (gold and silver), luxury watches (particularly Swiss and Rolex timepieces), jewelry (diamonds, gold, silver, platinum), musical equipment, electronics (TVs, digital cameras), and tools. Customers can either pawn items as collateral for confidential loans or sell items outright for cash. They provide on-site appraisals and quote services for items brought in by customers.

Fulton Loan distinguishes itself through claimed market expertise in Atlanta, specifically noting they stock a large selection of luxury items including Rolex watches, diamond engagement rings, gold jewelry, and diamond earrings. They explicitly position themselves as independent dealers of vintage watches, with full disclosure that they are not authorized Rolex agents and that all Rolex watches sold are pre-owned with Fulton Loan providing sole warranty coverage.

As a pawn shop, this business serves customers seeking immediate cash access without credit checks or income verification, but loans are limited to the appraised value of physical collateral. The business model inherently involves asset liquidation risk for borrowers who cannot repay loans, and the terms and rates of loans are not disclosed on their website, making cost comparison difficult for potential borrowers.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Over 100 years of operational history in Atlanta since 1924 demonstrates longevity and established local presence
Accepts diverse collateral types beyond jewelry including musical equipment, electronics, and tools
Provides both loan and purchase options for items, giving customers flexibility in how they monetize valuables
Specializes in luxury watch appraisal and sales, including Rolex timepieces
Offers confidential loans without requiring credit checks or income documentation
Claims competitive pricing on new and pre-owned jewelry inventory in the Atlanta market
Provides on-site professional appraisals for items before customers commit to transactions
cons: Website does not disclose loan terms, interest rates, fees, or repayment periods, making it impossible to assess cost competitiveness
Pawn model creates risk of permanent asset loss if loans cannot be repaid and items are forfeited
No information provided about loan approval process, processing time, or maximum loan amounts
Limited transparency about pricing methodology used for appraisals and valuations
Website lacks reviews, ratings, or customer testimonials to verify quality claims about inventory and service
best_for: Individuals with immediate cash needs who own valuable items they can use as collateral
People seeking confidential loans without credit checks or income verification requirements
Sellers of luxury watches, jewelry, or precious metals wanting quick cash transactions with expert appraisal
diagnosis: Fulton Loan is best suited for individuals who own valuable items (jewelry, watches, electronics, tools) and need immediate cash without a credit check, or for buyers seeking pre-owned luxury items at retail prices. The primary caveat is that borrowers risk permanent asset loss if they cannot repay loans, and the complete absence of pricing information on their website prevents informed rate comparison before visiting the store.
services: Gold and silver pawn loans and direct purchase
Luxury Swiss watch appraisal and pawn loans
Diamond and precious metal jewelry pawn loans
Collateral loans on electronics (TVs, digital cameras)
Collateral loans on tools and equipment
Professional in-store item appraisal and quoting
Direct purchase of gold, silver, and valuables
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
